nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Abd al-Kuri sparrow
nodes.summary: Abd al-Kuri sparrow（Abd al-Kuri sparrow，学名 Passer hemileucus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括猎捕压力、小种群风险。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: thumb|Female (Above) and Male (Below) illustrated by Henrik Grønvold The Abd al-Kuri sparrow is threatened by locals who are hunting them for food; it is also subject to natural disasters such as cyclones. Due to the sparrows' small population size, hunting, largely in the Autumn season, is a major threat to this species. There are only four passerines breeding on the island of Abd al-Kuri, so harvesting causes significant impacts on the sparrows' population
